items.example: There was a misunderstanding about the time of the meeting.
I ended up at the wrong house because I'd got the wrong address.
We got the date wrong and arrived a day early.
I answered the phone, but it was a wrong number.
She didn't recognise my voice on the phone.
Let me reformulate my question to make it clearer.
I need some clarification on this point.
I didn't realise it was for today.

items.term: it was a different person with the same name
items.translation: это был другой человек с тем же именем
items.example: I was expecting Pete, but it was a different Peter Smith.

items.term: there are two streets with the same name
items.translation: есть две улицы с одинаковым названием
items.example: We went to the wrong street because there are two with the same name.
